subject: ea:project:palimpsests
statement: Palimpsests uses ORETH as its audio intelligence and artistic research layer.

subject: ea:program:oreth
statement: ORETH applies signal archaeology to audio analysis, machine listening and sonic trace interpretation.

subject: ea:program:oreth
statement: ORETH applies generative-system thinking to experimental audio structures and pattern exploration.

subject: ea:project:palimpsests
statement: Palimpsests applies signal archaeology by treating sonic residue and media traces as cultural material.

subject: ea:project:palimpsests
statement: Palimpsests applies digital preservation by treating audio, visual and research traces as a compound cultural record.

subject: ea:project:vestiges
statement: Vestiges applies knowledge-graph principles to culture, craft, institutions, techniques and public knowledge pages.

subject: ea:program:vaste
statement: VASTE applies contextual execution through identity-aware graph records, relations, permissions and event propagation.

subject: ea:researchField:runtime-theory

subject: ea:publication:knowledge-graphs-for-cultural-infrastructure
